evidence_summary: Kolyma exports a large stable share of annual DOC during Discharge-centered freshet; no detectable annual change is carried forward.
Lena exports a large stable share of annual DOC during Discharge-centered freshet; no detectable annual change is carried forward.
Mackenzie has no detectable annual flux change and no strong evidence for changing export phenology.
Ob exports a large stable share of annual DOC during Discharge-centered freshet; no detectable annual change is carried forward.
Yenisey exports a large stable share of annual DOC during Discharge-centered freshet; no detectable annual change is carried forward.
Yukon is best interpreted as discharge-volume-driven extended-season export expansion; high-flow windows matter but do not alone explain the annual increase.
